@@ -0,0 +1,46 @@
+# Wordiest (iOS)
+
+Wordiest is a word game.
+
+## Credits
+
+- **Original game**: Darrell Anderson
+- **iOS port**: Jesse Vincent
+
+This project is not affiliated with Concrete Rose / “Concreterose”.
+
+## Privacy
+
+Privacy policy: `https://obra.github.io/wordiest/privacy.html`
+
+## Building
+
+This repo uses XcodeGen.
+
+1. `xcodegen generate`
+2. Open `Wordiest.xcodeproj`
+3. Build + run the `Wordiest` scheme
+
+## Assets derived from the original Android APK
+
+The public repository **must not** include the original APK. Some assets and data in this repo were extracted from that APK and are listed here for clarity:
+
+- `Wordiest/Resources/drop.mp3`
+- `Wordiest/Resources/pickup.mp3`
+- `Wordiest/Resources/matchdata.packed`
+- `Wordiest/Resources/words.def`
+- `Wordiest/Resources/words.idx`
+- `Wordiest/Resources/ic_core_overflow.png`
+- `Wordiest/Resources/ic_core_overflow@2x.png`
+- `Wordiest/Resources/ic_core_overflow@3x.png`
+- `Wordiest/Assets.xcassets/AppIcon.appiconset/*`
+
+If you replace any of the above, please keep this list up to date.
+
+## License
+
+- **Code**: MIT (see `LICENSE`)
+- **Istok Web font**: SIL Open Font License 1.1 (see `Wordiest/Resources/OFL.txt`)
+
+Other assets and word/definition data may have additional attribution and licensing requirements; see the in-app Credits screen for historical context.
+

+import Foundation

@@ -886,7 +886,7 @@ git commit -m "shell: add help pages"
 - Palette cycles 1..6 (colors ported from Android `colors.xml`).
 - Sound enabled/disabled persists; when disabled, do not play pickup/drop.
 - “Reset rating”: resets rating + clears history.
-- “Privacy policy”: opens `https://concreterose.github.io/privacypolicy.html`.
+- “Privacy policy”: opens `https://obra.github.io/wordiest/privacy.html`.
 
 **Commit:**

@@ -0,0 +1,52 @@ + + + + + + Wordiest Privacy Policy + + + +
+

Wordiest Privacy Policy

+

Last updated: 2025-12-16

+ +

Summary

+

+ Wordiest does not run analytics, does not show ads, and does not collect personal data. + Your game history and rating are stored locally on your device. +

+ +

Data stored on device

+
    +
  • Your local game history, rating, and settings.
    • +
+ +

Game Center

+

+ If you sign in to Game Center, Apple may process information needed for leaderboards and achievements. + Wordiest uses Game Center APIs, but does not receive your Apple ID. +

+ +

External links

+

+ If you tap a link to Wiktionary from inside the app, your browser will load a Wiktionary page. + Those requests are governed by Wiktionary’s policies. +

+ +

Contact

+

+ Questions? Open an issue on github.com/obra/wordiest. +

+
+ + +
